steps.title: Clear the denominator
steps.content: Multiply both sides of $u=-\dfrac{w}{188x}$ by $188x$:$$188x\cdot u=-w$$

steps.title: Compare with each choice
steps.content:
• A) $w=-188ux$: matches the derived expression.
  • B) $w=-\dfrac{188u}{x}$: would require dividing by $x$, but we multiplied by $188x$. Eliminated.
  • C) $w=\dfrac{x}{188u}$: wrong variable placement and wrong sign. Eliminated.
  • D) $w=u+188x$: the original equation is multiplicative, not additive. Eliminated.
A is correct.
